rationale: No conflict. The proposed change concerns the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §38.006 governs e-cigarettes and tobacco on school property and is wholly unrelated.
quote:
The board of trustees of a school district shall:
(1) prohibit smoking or using e-cigarettes or tobacco products at a school-related or school-sanctioned activity on or off school property;
_note: Rule text is topically unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no interaction detected.
